name: Endymion Empire
name_jp: エンディミオン<ruby lang="jp"><rb>皇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>国</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is activated: Add 1 "Regulus, the Prince of Endymion" or 1 monster that mentions it from your Deck to your hand, then if your opponent controls a monster, you can Special Summon 1 Spellcaster monster from your hand. If a card(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can destroy 1 "Regulus, the Prince of Endymion" in your hand or face-up Monster Zone instead. You can only use this effect of "Endymion Empire" once per turn. You can only activate 1 "Endymion Empire" per turn.
eff: When this card is activated: Add 1 "Regulus, the Prince of Endymion" or 1 monster that mentions it from your Deck to your hand, then if your opponent controls a monster, you can Special Summon 1 Spellcaster monster from your hand. If a card(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can destroy 1 "Regulus, the Prince of Endymion" in your hand or face-up Monster Zone instead. You can only use this effect of "Endymion Empire" once per turn. You can only activate 1 "Endymion Empire" per turn.

mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
